'''√h-f-k''' ('''kahafak''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:magic|magic]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| h-f-k
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:magic|magic]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| √h-f-k
|-
! Lemma
| kahafak
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || thihafak || jihafak || shihafak || kihafak
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || thuthuhafak || jujuhafak || shushuhafak || kukuhafak
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || thuhafak || juhafak || shuhafak || kuhafak
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || thuhafak || juhafak || shuhafak || kuhafak
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || thehafak || jehafak || shehafak || kehafak
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || thothohafak || jojohafak || shoshohafak || kokohafak
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || thohafak || johafak || shohafak || kohafak
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || thohafak || johafak || shohafak || kohafak
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || hafak || hafak || hafak || hafak
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || hafak || hafak || hafak || hafak
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || hafak || hafak || hafak || hafak
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || hafak || hafak || hafak || hafak
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || thæhafak || jæhafak || shæhafak || kæhafak
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || thathahafak || jajahafak || shashahafak || kakahafak
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || thahafak || jahafak || shahafak || kahafak
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || thahafak || jahafak || shahafak || kahafak
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || shahafak
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || goshahafak
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || gokishahafak
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || shahafaknü
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || goshahafaknknü
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || gokishahafaknü
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || shahafakshë
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || goshahafaknkshë
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || gokishahafakshë
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || shahafakro
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || goshahafaknkro
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || gokishahafakro
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || shahafakmu
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || goshahafaknkmu
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || gokishahafakmu
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || shahafaksher
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || goshahafaknksher
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || gokishahafaksher
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || shahafakng
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || goshahafaknkng
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || gokishahafakng
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || shahafakya
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || goshahafaknkya
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || gokishahafakya
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || shahafakyam
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || goshahafaknkyam
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || gokishahafakyam
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || shahafaknüshë
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || goshahafaknknüshë
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || gokishahafaknüshë
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || shahafaknüro
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || goshahafaknknüro
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || gokishahafaknüro
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || shahafaknümu
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || goshahafaknknümu
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || gokishahafaknümu
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || shahafakshënü
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || goshahafaknkshënü
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || gokishahafakshënü
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || shahafakshëro
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || goshahafaknkshëro
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || gokishahafakshëro
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || shahafakshëmu
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || goshahafaknkshëmu
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || gokishahafakshëmu
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || shahafakronü
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || goshahafaknkronü
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || gokishahafakronü
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || shahafakroshë
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || goshahafaknkroshë
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || gokishahafakroshë
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || shahafakromu
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || goshahafaknkromu
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || gokishahafakromu
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || shahafakmunü
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || goshahafaknkmunü
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || gokishahafakmunü
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || shahafakmushë
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || goshahafaknkmushë
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || gokishahafakmushë
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || shahafakmuro
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || goshahafaknkmuro
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || gokishahafakmuro
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

{{wordpage|d176386}}
